overall.description: A first-person journey through a scenic mountain canyon in a high-fidelity video game. The camera walks along a rocky riverside path, enters the clear water, swims underwater to reveal the rocky riverbed, then resurfaces to continue along the river surface. The environment features steep rocky cliffs, scattered pine trees, and distant snow-capped mountains under bright daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon trail alongside mountain river

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated rocky path beside the river, with canyon walls rising on both sides

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with sparse vegetation on the left side of the canyon
large gray rock formation immediately beside the path on the right
clear flowing river running through the canyon center
scattered evergreen trees along the riverbank and cliff tops
snow-capped mountain peaks visible in the distant background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a first-person view walking along a narrow rocky trail through a mountain canyon. Steep canyon walls flank both sides with a clear river flowing through the center. Pine trees dot the landscape and snow-capped peaks are visible in the distance under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: sloping riverbank approach with rocky shoreline

events.description: path begins descending from elevated trail toward the water level

agents.ego_description: walking downhill toward the river's edge, approaching the water where the terrain levels out

entered.detail: gravel and stone shoreline at the water's edge
large fallen tree trunk partially submerged in the river

segments.scene_description: The camera descends from the elevated trail toward the river level, approaching the rocky shoreline. The right canyon wall recedes slightly into the mid-ground while the river water becomes more prominent in the near field. A fallen log is visible in the water ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: underwater river canyon with clear visibility

events.description: camera enters the river water, view becomes partially submerged with surface ripples
view transitions fully underwater to darker greenish lighting with visible riverbed

agents.ego_description: swimming underwater through the clear river, revealing the rocky riverbed and submerged boulders below the surface

entered.detail: rocky bottom of the river visible through clear water with pebbles and stones
large boulders scattered across the riverbed beneath the surface

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the river and submerges completely underwater. The lighting shifts to a darker greenish tone as the view reveals the rocky riverbed below. Large submerged boulders and pebbles are visible on the bottom while the canyon walls and sky are temporarily occluded by the water surface above.

scene_state.functional_zone: river surface level in open mountain canyon

events.description: camera emerges from underwater back to surface level, sky becomes visible again

agents.ego_description: swimming at the water surface, looking along the river canyon with views of the surrounding cliffs and distant mountains

entered.detail: blue sky with scattered clouds visible again above the canyon
steep cliff face on the left side of the river now visible from water level

segments.scene_description: The camera resurfaces from the underwater exploration, transitioning back to the bright natural lighting above water. The view now shows the river surface level with the left canyon wall visible in the distance, pine trees along the banks, and the snowy mountain peaks reappearing ahead as the journey continues along the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that descends from a high mountain trail into the depths of a river before resurfacing back into the bright canyon light. It begins by walking along a narrow rocky path flanked by steep walls and distant snow-capped peaks under a midday sun. As the camera descends from the elevated trail toward the shoreline, the river becomes the central focus, leading the view toward a fallen log in the water. The scene then shifts abruptly as the camera submerges, transitioning from bright daylight to a darker greenish hue that reveals a rocky riverbed filled with boulders and pebbles. Finally, the camera resurfaces to restore the natural lighting, gliding along the water's surface with the left canyon wall and snowy mountains reappearing in the distance.
